headline: Carmakers Retreat On EVs, But Long-Term Outlook Remains Solid: Analyst
summary: Counterpoint Research slashes 2035 global EV sales outlook to 50% from 65% as automakers scale back production and face $70B in losses.

raw.headline: Carmakers Retreat On EVs, But Long-Term Outlook Remains Solid: Analyst

headline: China's Changan aims to be among world's top-10 carmakers by 2030
summary: Changan said on Tuesday it aims to be one of the world's top-10 automakers by 2030 and grow its global sales by more than two-thirds, joining a number of other Chinese automakers setting ambitious...
